name: Kanemi Co., Ltd.
summary: Kanemi Co., Ltd. produces and sells boxed meals for convenience stores in Japan. The company also operates retail stores that offer products, such as sushi, deep-fried foods, and other prepared foods. It operates 275 tenant outlets and 3 restaurants. Kanemi Co., Ltd. was founded in 1969 and is headquartered in Nagoya, Japan. Kanemi Co., Ltd. is a subsidiary of FamilyMart UNY Holdings Co., Ltd.
